しれーかん、きゅん……おはにょぉぉ……<br>ふわぁ～……なんとか起きれて、よか:
Comm-kunn... g'morningoo...
Mhwaaah~... glad I... managed to wake up...
んぅ、はぁ……しかし、やはり君たち人間は凄いな。<br>１日を無駄にしないどころ:
Mmnh, haah... even so, humans really are incredible.
Up this early, not wasting a moment of the day...
長寿が故にのんびり屋で、時間をよく無駄にしている<br>私たちエルフとは大違いだ:
The difference from us elves — long-lived and leisurely,
always wasting time — is remarkable. I truly admire it.
ん？ 当然のこと？ 別に褒められることではない？<br>何を言っているんだ。それ:
Hm? It's natural? Not worth praising?
The very fact you think that is what makes you remarkable.
よし。この際だから君たち人間どれだけ凄いかじっくり教えてやるぞ。<br>とりあえ:
Right then. Since we're at it, let me explain in full just how
incredible humans are. Can I borrow two full days? Hm? Too long?
